title: Add Spix - Personal Fitness Companion to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive hits the gym
gist.blurb: Spix just joined the ecosystem! It's a personal fitness companion built with React Native that keeps all your workout data local and private.
gist.summary: Added 'Spix - Personal Fitness Companion', a privacy-focused workout and health tracking app built with React Native, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Spix in the app directory to track their fitness goals while keeping their data completely local.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a fitness tracking app called 'Spix'. Visuals should include the pollinations bee (Polly) working out or tracking fitness. Polly wearing a tiny sweatband, lifting a tiny pixel dumbbell, with a retro monitor showing a fitness chart in a cozy garden setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny pink sweatband, lifting a small pixelated dumbbell in a sunny digital garden. A retro computer monitor nearby displays a green fitness chart. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
